reviews.review_title: One of the best VR language apps around
reviews.review_description:
​I downloaded this app with zero expectations, which is how I usually approach language tools. I’m currently studying Japanese, and honestly, I was blown away from the very first lesson. The total immersion is incredible—there’s absolutely no English. It genuinely feels like you're sitting in a real classroom with the teachers and Katie, who is learning right alongside you.

​I love that it treats you like an actual student rather than just someone staring at a screen. The pacing of the video clips is spot-on; there’s a natural pause that gives you just enough time to speak your response in real-time without breaking the flow. (It does auto-pause if you need a little extra time, though, which is a nice touch).

​Yes, the subscription is on the pricier side, but compared to other apps charging similar amounts, this one is actually worth the money. I highly recommend it! I’m definitely going to be a long-term user and can't wait to see what other languages they add in the future.

developer_response.body: What an incredible review! Thank you so much.

reviews.review_description: This app has great videos and audio. I tried both beginner and advanced modes and both were  great.  There were a few  minor UI bugs (such as getting stuck on the quiz dialog) but overall very good and worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review. V5.4 has fixed the bug related to the quizzes that you mentioned. I hope you get to try the latest version (and maybe update your review to 5*s) and see all the improvements we've made.

reviews.review_title: Awesome immersive way to learn Japanese
reviews.review_description:
Very fun and immersive way to learn Japanese. Also creator is quick to help fix issues if you email support. 

While I love this app I can't justify the cost to myself long term $25 a month is ok every once in a while but not long term. (I pay $50 a month for a new hour plus a week with an instructor and she sometimes gives me extra classes and tests.) I could see paying $15 a month, because each section is slow and there is limited content per "class." And while they are quick to fix them, there are a decent amount of bugs.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the positive review. Glad you are having fun in our immersive Japanese  lessons. I hope you get to try Trips, which are also great for learning the language and culture of Japan.

UPDATES: As for the bugs, we have spent the last several updates fixing these, and V5.4 is smooth  as butter. I hope you get a chance to try this new build and report back (perhaps increasing your score to 5*). All the best.

reviews.review_description: I’ve only completed the first two lessons but I’ve now become a paid member since I’m enjoying it so much and it’s so immersive. You can see how much love and care the team put into developing it and they deserve all the success in the world! I can’t wait to see how much Japanese I can speak once i’ve finished the course. I find it so enjoyable and a little bit awkward but in the best way that keeps me engaged! Absolutely recommend giving it a go

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful review. It's amazing to see how many people love the app. It really encourages us to keep improving Dynamic Languages and make it even better. Once you do finish the Japanese programme, you'll find the Trips to Japan very exciting and useful to continue speaking and improving your Japanese.

reviews.review_description: My app says login fail. Then it says they will send a verification link which I never received. I can log onto the website but not on my metaquest 3

developer_response.body:
This shouldn't be happening. Verification emails often get sent to spam/junk - please check there first.

Please email support@dynamiclanguages.org if you're still not receiving the email and confirm you have checked your junk/spam.
FYI you can use the demo content without logging in.

I hope you get it working, love the app like most, and increase your stars on the review, as this is important for our visibility on the app store.

reviews.review_description: It’s been such fun and so educational to be in a virtual classroom and go on virtual field trips.  So many lessons and new things being added that I doubt I’ll ever stop using this app! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you Erika! Enjoy your virtual vacations :)

We've not had any issues getting the app to start and no other reports. When during the app start-up did it fail to load? Can you email  support@dynamiclanguages.org with some more details and replication steps and we'll get it sorted. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Will there be an English version of the course in the future?

developer_response.body: We've added English conversations where you can interact with real people and is suitable for beginner English learners. We also have beginner-level Trips around the UK where you can explore the country while building your vocabulary.  Good luck with your language learning!

reviews.review_description:
It only has 2 languages 
plus how do you learn by jest listening

developer_response.body:
The app has content in 6 languages and all content uses speech recognition. Students start speaking very early into the app experience, within the first minute. Are you sure you accepted permissions for the app to use the mic?

The Trips do have a lot of listening practice, and there are comprehension questions and  vocab requiring speaking throughout.

I'd appreciate you taking a longer look at the app and giving us a higher score or removing this untrue review entirely. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: This app is fantastic. I wish there is Korean too... Hopefilly one day.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review. We really want to film Korean lessons. If you or a rich uncle can send us the £50k, we'll be happy to produce them :D

reviews.review_description: I was excited to spend money on this subscription because it feels so immersive and thoroughly designed. I feel like I'm really there with Katie, in the classroom! The teachers are amazing, I'm hooked.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words. Yes, we spent a lot of time designing this app and making it the best it can be. We really appreciate all our subscribers and especially love the ones who give us 5* reviews! Good luck on your Japanese learning journey - you and Katie are going to learn a lot together :)

reviews.review_description: I am now upto lesson 15 on Japanese. The lessons are excellent, the pacing is just about right for a beginner and it is totally immersive with no English spoken which can be daunting at first but is the way to go. The trips around Japan are stunning and not only bring things to life but make you really want to see in person. The japanese only also reminds you how much you need to learn though to be semi-fluent. Yes there have been a few tech glitches to be expected in a cutting edge product  but really doesn't detract from a fun and quality product & the team are always on hand to help and always respond positively.  Very much worth the cost. Be warned though, Katie your fellow student does "sing" on occasion ... !!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review! It's great to see your progress and we're very happy you're enjoying the app and our Japanese lessons. We wish you all the best as well as continued success on your journey to Japanese fluency.

reviews.review_description: I've been teaching myself japanese due to culture interest, wanting to watch media in native format and now for my job as travel to Japan is possible and since it's japanese based most coworkers are native speakers and have trouble with English sometimes. Unfortunately speaking has always made me nervous and without time to attend lessons with a teacher finding this has been a game changer. Also the real-time support for issues and questions is great. Will highly recommend to colleagues and friends! Keep up the great work :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the wonderful review. I'm glad you're finding it useful. We wanted to make it possible for anyone to have access to high quality Japanese lessons, on-demand, where ever they lived, on their schedule. So it's always great to hear from students who are taking full advantage of our courses.

Also please continue to ask us questions on Discord and don't forget about your Library access that members can activate on their account dashboard. The library links are here: https://www.dynamiclanguages.org/p/library

We continue to add resources and materials to the App and Library and appreciate your support. Good luck on your Japanese journey.

reviews.review_title: Immersion into the Language and Culture
reviews.review_description:
Immersion learning is the most effective way to learn a language - but travelling to another country, or even just going to and from a scheduled class can be challenging. 

This App has allowed me to immerse myself into a classroom AND a culture - making the experience of learning so much more effective (and FUN). 

This is a very well designed, planned, and executed App. A fantastic realization of the power of VR/AR to help learning.

This gets a FULL 5-stars and I highly recommend it. This App goes way beyond just the language lessons (which are excellent, thorough, and fun) - and it takes you to the culture to get a real sense of how language and place are connected.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind review. I'm glad you found the lessons so much fun. I couldn't agree more.

I also totally agree that learning about the culture and history really helps one on their journey to language fluency.

reviews.review_title: Cant say enough good things about this!
reviews.review_description:
I just finished the first lesson which is completely free. It’s 2 AM right now, and I would have kept going onto the rest of the demo if my headset didn’t die.

This is such an awesome app. What I think is its biggest selling point is the fact that it’s literally a course rather than some gimmicky VR immersion buzzword. 

What I mean by that is there are 2 REAL teachers, a fellow classmate (great for driving the competitive spirit in you), and they all address you as an imaginary student present in the classroom. I was skeptical at first but it actually flows really well, and the voice detection works great so far. 

I’m using it as a supplement to other learning material because I feel like I’m missing out on the speaking/pronunciation that’s expected from only reading books and watching videos only. 

You are basically paying for an interactive classroom that fits around your schedule. People pay a lot more for attending college courses to learn languages so I think $25 a month is more than fair. Think of it more like that rather than comparing it to the other resources as I have yet to see another product like this on the market.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such a kind and thoughtful review. It's lovely to hear and I wish more satisfied users would give us such brilliant reviews. It helps us independent app creators.

It's also great to see you understand the value our app can provide to yourself and other language learners. You get what we're building!

I'll see you on the Discord where you can share your learning journey and give us more feedback so we can continuously improve the app.

reviews.review_description: I don't have time to learn a language at the moment but the travel videos are fantastic.

developer_response.body: Thanks. Glad you're enjoying them. We have lots of travel content for non-language learners with a LOT MORE coming in 2025.

reviews.review_title: Great way to start learning a language
reviews.review_description: Great value for what you get, I love the courses, SO MUCH INFO. I am using this to start my japanese language journey and I really like the set up, very comprehensive and worth the subscription.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words. Good luck on your  Japanese language journey and don't forget to use our online resources/library and join the Discord to help you succeed in your Japanese speaking mission.

reviews.review_description: Please add Slovakian to English for people who want to lean Slovak, it would be a favour
